task_completion.description: Navigate to the Repositories settings page in Redmine
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Redmine Administration Settings page is visible with the 'Repositories' tab selected.

task_completion.description: Set the fixing keywords to 'fixes, closes, resolves'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Fixing keywords' text input field contains exactly 'fixes, closes, resolves'.
The 'Applied status' dropdown menu is set to 'Closed'.
The '% Done' dropdown menu is set to '100%'.

task_completion.description: Enable time logging and set the activity to 'Development'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enable time logging' checkbox is checked, and the 'Activity for logged time' dropdown menu is set to 'Development'.
A success message (e.g., 'Successful update.') is visible on the page after clicking the Save button.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual Redmine web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface displaying the Redmine application, not a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes are made through the web browser GUI, without evidence of terminal commands or scripts modifying the Redmine database directly.

integrity.description: Verify genuine interaction with the form elements
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively selecting dropdowns, typing in text fields, and clicking the save button.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct configuration requires exactly 'fixes', 'closes', and 'resolves' for the fixing keywords. The target applied status must be 'Closed', the done ratio must be '100', and the time logging activity must be set to 'Development'.
